name: Full Name

loginCouldNotSendFreshEmail: Could not send a fresh email. Please email {{supportEmail}}.
loginFreshEmailSent: ✓ Fresh verification email sent. Check your inbox (and spam).
registerVerificationSentTo: We sent a verification link to {{email}}. Please verify your email before signing in.
registerAccountCreatedButBody:
Your account was created, but we could not send the verification email to {{email}}.

Tap below to try sending the link again. If it still does not arrive, please contact {{supportEmail}}.
registerFreshEmailOnTheWay: ✓ A fresh verification email is on its way.
registerEmailNotOnFile: We do not have your email on file. Try signing up again or email {{supportEmail}}.
registerCouldNotSendNow: Could not send a fresh email right now. Please email {{supportEmail}}.
forgotHeaderSubtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgotResetLinkBody: If an account exists for {{email}}, you'll receive a password reset link shortly.
pendingBody:
We sent a verification link to
{{email}}.

Tap it to confirm your address. Once verified, you can return here and continue.
pendingEmailNotOnFile: We do not have your email on file. Please sign out and sign in again.
pendingCouldNotSendNow: Could not send a fresh email right now. Try again or email {{supportEmail}}.
pendingFreshEmailOnTheWay: ✓ Fresh email on its way. Check your inbox (and spam folder).
verifyNoToken: No verification token in the link. Please tap the link in your email exactly as it was sent.
verifyCouldNotVerify: We could not verify this link. The link may have expired (24-hour limit) or already been used.
verifyNeedEmailToResend: We need your email to resend the verification link. Please go back to sign in and tap "Resend verification email" from there.
verifyCouldNotSendNow: Could not send a fresh email right now. Please try again or contact {{supportEmail}}.
verifyVerifyingBody: One sacred breath. We are confirming your link.
verifySuccessBody: You may now sign in. Redirecting…
verifyErrorBody: The verification link is invalid or expired. Request a fresh one below.
verifyFreshEmailOnTheWayTo: ✓ A fresh verification email is on its way to {{email}}.
